languages.original_text: "Reserve your hopes for yourself and your biomancy, Interrogator. You have endured a great deal yourself, devote your thoughts to your own well-being instead of worrying about my future."

languages.text: "Уповайте на себя и свою биомантию, дознаватель. Вы тоже многое пережили, займите мысли собственным благополучием, вместо хлопот о моем будущем".
"Reserve your hopes for yourself and your biomancy, Interrogator. You have endured a great deal yourself, devote your thoughts to your own well-being instead of worrying about my future."
languages.original_text: "Уповайте на себя и свою биомантию, дознаватель. Вы тоже многое пережили, займите мысли собственным благополучием, вместо хлопот о моем будущем".

traits.locale_text: "Reserve your hopes for yourself and your biomancy, Interrogator. You have endured a great deal yourself, devote your thoughts to your own well-being instead of worrying about my future."
"Reserve your hopes for yourself and your biomancy, Interrogator. You have endured a great deal yourself, devote your thoughts to your own well-being instead of worrying about my future."
"Reserve your hopes for yourself and your biomancy, Interrogator. You have endured a great deal yourself, devote your thoughts to your own well-being instead of worrying about my future."

languages.text: «Guárdese las esperanzas para sí mismo y su biomancia, interrogador. Usted también ha soportado mucho. Dedique sus pensamientos a su propio bienestar en lugar de preocuparse por mi futuro».
languages.original_text: "Reserve your hopes for yourself and your biomancy, Interrogator. You have endured a great deal yourself, devote your thoughts to your own well-being instead of worrying about my future."

traits.locale_text: «Guárdese las esperanzas para sí mismo y su biomancia, interrogador. Usted también ha soportado mucho. Dedique sus pensamientos a su propio bienestar en lugar de preocuparse por mi futuro».

languages.text: 「その望みは、ご自身とご自身のバイオマンシーのために取っておきなさい、インテロゲイター。あなたとて多くを耐え忍んできたのです。私の行く末を案じるより、ご自身の安寧に思いを向けなさい」
languages.original_text: "Reserve your hopes for yourself and your biomancy, Interrogator. You have endured a great deal yourself, devote your thoughts to your own well-being instead of worrying about my future."

traits.locale_text: 「その望みは、ご自身とご自身のバイオマンシーのために取っておきなさい、インテロゲイター。あなたとて多くを耐え忍んできたのです。私の行く末を案じるより、ご自身の安寧に思いを向けなさい」

languages.text: “审讯官，把希望留给你自己和你的生物法术吧。你也承受了很多，你应当专注自身的健康，而非忧心我的未来。”
languages.original_text: "Reserve your hopes for yourself and your biomancy, Interrogator. You have endured a great deal yourself, devote your thoughts to your own well-being instead of worrying about my future."

traits.locale_text: “审讯官，把希望留给你自己和你的生物法术吧。你也承受了很多，你应当专注自身的健康，而非忧心我的未来。”

languages.text: "Spart Euch Eure Hoffnung für Euch und Eure Biomantie auf, Interrogator. Ihr musstet selbst viel ertragen. Widmet Eure Gedanken Eurem eigenen Wohlergehen, anstatt Euch über meine Zukunft Gedanken zu machen."
languages.original_text: "Reserve your hopes for yourself and your biomancy, Interrogator. You have endured a great deal yourself, devote your thoughts to your own well-being instead of worrying about my future."

traits.locale_text: "Spart Euch Eure Hoffnung für Euch und Eure Biomantie auf, Interrogator. Ihr musstet selbst viel ertragen. Widmet Eure Gedanken Eurem eigenen Wohlergehen, anstatt Euch über meine Zukunft Gedanken zu machen."

languages.text: « Gardez vos espoirs pour vous-même et pour votre biomancie, interrogateur. Vous aussi, vous avez enduré de terribles épreuves, alors préoccupez-vous de votre propre bien-être, et non de mon avenir. »
languages.original_text: "Reserve your hopes for yourself and your biomancy, Interrogator. You have endured a great deal yourself, devote your thoughts to your own well-being instead of worrying about my future."

traits.locale_text: « Gardez vos espoirs pour vous-même et pour votre biomancie, interrogateur. Vous aussi, vous avez enduré de terribles épreuves, alors préoccupez-vous de votre propre bien-être, et non de mon avenir. »

languages.text: "Umutlarınızı kendinize ve biyobazlığa saklayın Sorgucu. Siz de pek çok şeye katlandınız. Benim geleceğim için endişelenmek yerine kendi esenliğinize odaklanın."
languages.original_text: "Reserve your hopes for yourself and your biomancy, Interrogator. You have endured a great deal yourself, devote your thoughts to your own well-being instead of worrying about my future."

traits.locale_text: "Umutlarınızı kendinize ve biyobazlığa saklayın Sorgucu. Siz de pek çok şeye katlandınız. Benim geleceğim için endişelenmek yerine kendi esenliğinize odaklanın."
